title: Sand Bounties
description: Husks drop sand/red sand based on the desert biome they die in
body:
With Sand Bounties, whenever a player defeats a Husk, there is a 50 % chance for it to drop additional items. These additional drops are based on what biome the Husk dies in. 

Valid biomes for additional drops are:
* Desert -> Sand
* Badlands, Eroded Badlands and Wooded Badlands -> Red Sand

If the Husk is on fire it will drop Glass blocks instead of Sand / Red Sand.
